title: henriettella lateriflora
intro: Henriettella lateriflora, a plant species in the family Melastomataceae, is also known as the 'Brazilian Oregano' or 'Hawaiian Oregano'. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, antifungal, and antiviral activities, which contribute to its health benefits. The plant is known to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, making it useful in reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Henriettella lateriflora can be prepared into teas, infusions, tinctures, and capsules, and is also used as a culinary herb in various dishes.
